title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search publishes a news roundup covering 20+ recent AI tools and research projects including 3D generation, world models, LLMs, text-to-speech, video synthesis, and robotics. The episode highlights releases from Pixal3D, Sana-WM, MiniCPM, Krea2, and updates to ChatGPT Finance and Codex mobile access.
